notes: vinfastauto.us US consumer site. Both currently-sold US models are BEV (VF 8 MY2025, VF 9 MY2024 — verify if MY2025 has shipped). All US-sold VinFast units are Hai Phong (Vietnam) assembled; Chatham County NC plant pushed to 2028 SOP. VF 7 and VF 6 are out of scope (not yet launched US). Brand specs reference 'static-cms-prod.vinfastauto.us' for PDFs and serves images via the same CMS domain.
